name: io.github.oomkapwn/enquire-mcp
description: Long-term memory for AI agents — your Obsidian vault as searchable persistent memory.

runtimeArguments.description: Subcommand: serve (stdio MCP), serve-http (remote MCP), setup (download model + build indexes), doctor (health check) — run with no subcommand for the full list.

runtimeArguments.name: --vault
runtimeArguments.description: Path to your Obsidian vault root directory
